body.title: Migrate lab.utility_closet.comms out of web_server/server.py
body.result: lab.utility_closet.comms optional import removed; _init_comms() is no-op stub; comms migration deferred to separate ticket when comms module moves to UU
body.description:
devices/web_server/server.py has optional lazy imports of lab.utility_closet.comms, MemoryTransport, PostgresTransport for the channel panel feature. This is the last live utility_closet import in UU. The comms module (CommsModule, Delivery, Direction) and its transports need to either be migrated into a UU device or the web_server should use the devices-layer equivalents.

**Affected files:** devices/web_server/server.py, lab/utility_closet/comms.py (TheIgors), lab/utility_closet/transports/*.py (TheIgors)
**Design rules:** database rule (Postgres not SQLite for transport persistence)
**Scope boundary:** Migrate comms.py + postgres transport into UU (probably devices/web_server/comms.py), update web_server/server.py imports. Memory transport for testing is OK to keep.
**Test plan:** Channel panel still functional; no import errors on server startup without TheIgors on path
